"'''Harbingers of Doom'''" was an article in [[Star Wars Gamer 7|''Star Wars Gamer'' 7]]. The article covered several special ships from the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], giving brief histories and stats.

==Contents==
*[[Mist Hunter/Legends|''Mist Hunter'']]
*[[Hound's Tooth/Legends|''Hound's Tooth'']]
*''[[Slave II]]''
*[[Punishing One/Legends|''Punishing One'']]
*[[IG-2000/Legends|''IG-2000'']]

[[File:Mist_Hunter.jpg|thumb|left|250px|A picture of the [[Mist Hunter/Legends|''Mist Hunter'']] from the article.]]
